articles.description: McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the pace in second practice at the Japanese Grand Prix ahead of the Mercedes of Kimi Antonelli and George Russell.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: Oscar Piastri heads Kimi Antonelli and George Russell in Suzuka Friday practice

articles.description: All the latest reaction as Northern Ireland and Wales are knocked out of the World Cup qualifiers in a disappointing night.
articles.title: World Cup LIVE: Northern Ireland and Wales beaten in qualifying play-offs

articles.description: Head coach Craig Bellamy rues the chaos of Wales' World Cup play-off semi-final loss to Bosnia-Herzegovina - but says his team have a bright future.
articles.title: Craig Bellamy: Wales boss rues Bosnia chaos but sees bright future

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Brazil vs France in the Friendlies
articles.title: Brazil 1-2 France: Kylian Mbappe one goal from equalling France's all-time scorer record

articles.description: American Coco Gauff cruises past 13th seed Karolina Muchova in straight sets to reach her first Miami Open final.
articles.title: Miami Open: American Coco Gauff cruises into first final of tournament

articles.description: Former England goalkeeper Paul Robinson says set-piece expertise could give Thomas Tuchel's side an X-factor this summer.
articles.title: Could England's set-pieces win them the World Cup?

articles.description: Tony Pulis explains why international breaks can be an opportunity as well as a problem for managers, and what he did when one of his players did not return on time.
articles.title: Tony Pulis column: Managing in an international break - and what to do when your star player does not come home

articles.description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says Ben White must "clear the air" with his team-mates after returning to the England squad for the first time since 2022.
articles.title: Ben White: Defender must clear air with England team-mates after return, says Thomas Tuchel

articles.description: Republic of Ireland's Sammie Szmodics spent a night in hospital as a result of the collision against the Czech Republic that left him unconscious.
articles.title: Republic of Ireland: Sammie Szmodics in hospital after collision

articles.description: The women's category of Olympic sports will be limited to biological females from 2028, says the International Olympic Committee.
articles.title: Women's Olympic sports limited to biological females from 2028 - IOC
